contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 20
- Description: Align Premium Dark Chocolate Bar subscription card on agroverse.shop homepage
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/178
  
  Details:
  The homepage subscription card broke the grammar every other product card follows: a marketing-subtitle title (— Single-Estate, Monthly Discovery), a unique $10.00/bar price suffix, and a CTA (Subscribe — pick your quantity · Cancel anytime) in the small-print provenance slot. Aligned the three body lines to match the other product cards: title 'Premium Dark Chocolate Bar — Monthly Subscription', plain price $10.00 (matching the two real $10 bars beside it), and grey third line 'Single-estate 81% dark · pick your quantity · cancel anytime'. Copy-only; markup/styles/links unchanged; 'Learn More' button kept (subscription). Landed in agroverse_shop_beta (beta-first), to be promoted to prod on review. PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/178
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
